nodes.name: Webhook - Receive Booking
nodes.notes: Entry point: Receives POST requests from Vapi AI with patient booking data. Path will be /webhook/dental-booking on your n8n instance.

nodes.name: Code - Process & Validate
nodes.notes: Validates all required fields, runs format checks, generates unique Booking ID, builds email HTML bodies, pre-builds JSON response strings.

nodes.name: IF - Valid Request?
nodes.notes: Routes the workflow: TRUE (output 0) = valid booking, continue to Sheets & Calendar. FALSE (output 1) = validation failed, return 400 error.

nodes.name: Respond - 400 Validation Error
nodes.notes: Returns HTTP 400 with JSON error body when required fields are missing or invalid. Vapi will receive this and can tell the patient what information is needed.

nodes.name: Sheets - Log to Logs
nodes.notes: Logs every valid incoming request to the 'Logs' sheet for debugging. continueOnFail=true means a Sheets error will NOT stop the booking from being processed.

nodes.name: Sheets - Append to Bookings
nodes.notes: Appends a new row to the 'Bookings' sheet with all patient and appointment data. continueOnFail=true so a Sheets failure won't stop Calendar creation.

additionalFields.location: 15 Watergate Street, Navan, Co. Meath, Ireland

nodes.name: Calendar - Create Event
nodes.notes: Creates a 30-minute calendar event on your primary Google Calendar. Event title format: 'PatientName - ServiceType'. continueOnFail=true allows error detection in the next IF node.

nodes.name: IF - Calendar Error?
nodes.notes: Checks if the Google Calendar node encountered an error. TRUE (output 0) = error occurred, route to admin alert. FALSE (output 1) = success, route to patient email.

nodes.name: Gmail - Patient Confirmation
nodes.notes: Sends a professional HTML confirmation email to the patient. continueOnFail=true so an email failure won't break the success response back to Vapi.

nodes.name: Respond - 200 Success
nodes.notes: Returns HTTP 200 with booking confirmation JSON to Vapi. Includes the unique booking ID. Vapi uses this to tell the patient their booking is confirmed.

nodes.name: Gmail - Admin Alert
nodes.notes: Sends an urgent alert email to the clinic admin when Calendar creation fails. Includes all patient details so staff can manually add the appointment.

nodes.name: Respond - 500 System Error
nodes.notes: Returns HTTP 500 when Calendar event creation failed. Vapi receives this and can tell the patient there was a technical issue and to call the clinic directly.
